title: Marketing Specialist (B2B Sales role)
matched_skills: CRM tools: Salesforce and HubSpot (listed in tools)
Sales collateral and demo presentation experience (partial match for negotiation/presentation)
GTM strategy (partial match for sales strategy)
missing_skills: Proven B2B sales experience (3-5 years) — Boru has product marketing background, not direct B2B sales
Fluent German — CV shows B2 level only, JD requires fluent (written and spoken)
Pipeline management and sales forecasting — not evidenced in CV
Self-motivated results-driven sales hunter profile — not substantiated by CV
core_responsibilities: Develop and implement sales strategies to achieve/exceed revenue targets
Identify and pursue new business opportunities in existing and new markets
Build and maintain long-term client and partner relationships
Conduct product presentations and negotiate with prospective customers
Prepare sales forecasts and provide regular reporting to management
recommended_emphasis: Sales enablement and demo/presentation experience (Leyard Europe: 20+ channel partners)
GTM strategy as a bridge to sales strategy thinking
_analysis_notes: This is a B2B sales role disguised under the 'Marketing Specialist' title. The JD requires proven B2B sales experience (3-5 years) and fluent German — two critical requirements Boru does not meet. German B2 is below fluent, and Boru's background is product marketing (GTM, positioning, enablement), not quota-carrying sales. Match score 38 is below the 50-point threshold for further LinkedIn company lookup. NOT RECOMMENDED for application.
